Client.title: Client
Client.description: A client for whom trust funds are held.

name.description: The full name of the client.

matterDescription.description: A brief description of the legal matter.

balance.description: The current balance held in trust for this client.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: A receipt or disbursement in the IOLTA account.

date.description: The date of the transaction (issue date for checks).

clearDate.description: The date the transaction cleared the bank.

amount.description: The transaction amount (positive for receipts, negative for disbursements).

bankBalance.description: The balance per the bank statement.

bookBalance.description: The balance per the firm's books (ledger).

clientBalanceTotal.description: The total of all individual client ledger balances.

StatementBalance.title: Statement Balance
StatementBalance.description: The ending balance from the bank statement for a specific month.

/statementBalances/{month}.description: Collection of monthly bank statement balances.
